rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DURAVKA RIEDL REVOCABLE TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Vacate Order Re Blocked Account And Dismiss Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: Granted as to the request to vacate the 9/5/13 Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, subject to the filing of a complete Proof of Service of notice of the motion. The amended petition is taken off calendar.
